nodes.label: AI as collaborative learning partner
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI as a learning tool by verifying against my current build and taking into consideration what it provides as feedback and learning from it

nodes.label: AI knowledge recency and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the current model is not exactly up to date on the latest version of PowerBI, etc we use in our industry. This leads to outdated advice or not up to date recommendations on queries

nodes.label: AI for low-priority repetitive tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for core judgment and expectation management
nodes.grounding_span: working together to enhance and optimize low priority tasks, repetitive things, etc is where AI can really shine

nodes.label: Organizational endorsement of AI
nodes.label_negative: Organizational skepticism or restriction of AI
nodes.grounding_span: My company has openly embraced AI and its widely recommended to use AI where possible

nodes.label: AI as productivity and value enhancer
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary or unhelpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: I view it as a tool to use and collaborate with to make me more productive and a valued asset with the teams I work with

nodes.label: Personal skill development and learning
nodes.grounding_span: I end up learning more and building my knowledge base on the topics I require assistance on

nodes.label: Workplace productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: make me more productive and a valued asset with the teams I work with

nodes.label: Reliable and accurate information
nodes.grounding_span: the more up to date they are the more I can rely on the most accurate information

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as learning accelerator
nodes.grounding_span: the efforts and collaboration I utilized while 'partering' with AI have made my learnings within the realms of SQL/PowerBI have been exponentially faster

nodes.label: Frustration with outdated AI knowledge
nodes.grounding_span: the current model is not exactly up to date on the latest version of PowerBI, etc we use in our industry. This leads to outdated advice

nodes.label: Optimistic anticipation of AI evolution
nodes.grounding_span: I look forward to see the AI models grow and learn, the more up to date they are the more I can rely on the most accurate information

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative over delegated AI use
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to collaborate throughout the task rather than delegating entire segments to the AI model

nodes.label: Iterative learning through verification and feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI as a learning tool by verifying against my current build and taking into consideration what it provides as feedback and learning from it

nodes.label: Task differentiation based on complexity and judgment
nodes.grounding_span: A lot of supply planning is about managing expectations and reacting with things don't go as expected, this (at the moment) I do not expect AI to handle
